review_execution.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --tools Read,Grep,Glob --permission-mode dontAsk --output-format json

C00.summary: Actual Claude CLI review verified validation_command_matrix_non_goal_boundary binds to RP00.P00.M07.S03, defines all required non-goals, enforces structured no_real_data evidence and broader generation-command exclusion patterns, preserves H00/C00/human approval boundaries, and does not claim product execution, generation output approval, real-data import, production mutation, all M07 completion, or RP00 completion.

findings.title: Downstream closeout artifacts not yet attached (expected at C00 stage)
findings.details: At C00 review time only packet.json and command-evidence.json were present, which matched the implemented pre-closeout state. Claude recommended attaching actual review result, adjudication, and construction inspection before promotion.
findings.recommendation: Attach the actual Claude C00 review result, adjudication, and construction-inspection.json with validation_command_matrix_non_goal_boundary_verified=true, then rerun validation before production_ready.

parsed_review.review_notes: Actual claude-opus-4-8 max read-only CLI review completed with PASS and no P0/P1/P2 findings. The single P3 was the expected closeout assembly note and is fixed by this review result, adjudication, and construction inspection artifact set.
